creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
Incidentally, 

> SYNOPSIS
>     bectl [-h?] 

– should that have a vertical line? So: 

> SYNOPSIS
>     bectl [-h | ?] 

(Now I remember, <https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-src/pull/728/commits/f6f931d28b2d7c231317e52df641f15ef49042f3#diff-c02d05827bafa5f8205b59bd5e53274a6043030b432b47ffcb9bb7907bb5d5f5R26-R28> I could not figure out the markup to achieve it.)
